rationale: In the citing paper, Zhu et al. (2012) appears only as a single introductory example to support the broad claim that communities can have unintended negative consequences. The citation is not used in hypothesis development, construct operationalization, model specification, or interpretation of specific findings. The paper's core theoretical development instead relies on brand-community and social identity sources (e.g., Muniz and O'Guinn; Thompson and Sinha). Given this limited, example-style use, the role is a passing background mention rather than a meaningful substantive link.
